heroSubtitle: Search and explore approximately 700,000 SKOS terms with interactive hierarchical and associative relationships
searchPlaceholder: Search SKOS terms, concepts, and their relationships...
feature1Desc: Search through 700,000+ controlled SKOS terms in the General Glossary COBISS, available in Slovenian and English.
feature2Desc: Visualize hierarchical and associative relationships with an interactive force-directed graph. Explore broader, narrower, and related terms.
feature3Desc: Navigate through concept hierarchies with clear parent-child relationships and explore the full network of related terms.
feature4Desc: All terms are available in both Slovenian and English, making the Glossary accessible to international users.
aboutDesc: SGC Navigator is a web-based navigator for the Splošni geslovnik COBISS (SGC / General Glossary COBISS), a controlled Glossary in the Slovenian COBISS.SI system. This powerful tool enables users and librarians to explore interconnected concepts and their relationships.
designedFor1: COBISS Plus users seeking structured vocabulary
designedFor2: Librarians managing subject indexing and cataloging
whatYouCan1: Search for specific terms and concepts
whatYouCan2: Explore broader terms (hypernyms) and narrower terms (hyponyms)
whatYouCan3: Discover related terms and associated concepts
ctaText: Start by using the search bar above to find a term of interest, or explore the interactive graph to discover new connections and relationships in the Glossary.
